MyMembers.name: IndexByGlobalPos(Vector3D{int} pos, int length)
MyMembers.summary: Calculates the 1D index of a 3D global position.
MyMembers.param: The side length of the cubic region.

MyMembers.name: IndexByLocalPos(Vector3D{int} pos, int length)
MyMembers.summary: Calculates the 1D index of a 3D local position within a cubic region.
MyMembers.param: The 3D position relative to the region's origin.
The side length of the cubic region.
MyMembers.remarks: This method assumes is within the bounds [0, )

MyMembers.name: LocalPosByGlobalPos(Vector3D{int} pos, int length)
MyMembers.summary: Wraps a global position into a local position within the cubic region.
MyMembers.param: The side length of the cubic region.
MyMembers.returns: A 3D position inside a cubic region originated at 0,0,0
MyMembers.remarks: Uses a double-masking pattern to correctly handle negative coordinates, ensuring the result is always a positive offset within the region.

MyMembers.name: LocalPosByIndex(int index, int length)
MyMembers.summary: Decodes a 1D linear index into a 3D local position inside a cubic region.
MyMembers.param: The 0 based 1D linear index of the cubic region.
The side length of the cubic region.
MyMembers.returns: A 3D position inside a cubic region originated at 0,0,0

MyMembers.name: PosLocal(Vector3D{int} pos, int length)
MyMembers.summary: Determines if a 3D position is within a cubic region.
MyMembers.param: The side length of the cubic region.
MyMembers.returns: True when pos is within the cubic region.

MyMembers.name: IndexByGlobalPosMasked(Vector3D{int} pos, int mask)
MyMembers.summary: Calculates the 1D index of a 3D global position.
MyMembers.param: The bitwise mask length of the cubic region. (e.g 7, 15, 31)

MyMembers.name: LocalPosByGlobalPosMasked(Vector3D{int} pos, int mask)
MyMembers.summary: Wraps a global position into a local position within the cubic region.
MyMembers.param: The bitwise mask length of the cubic region. (e.g 7, 15, 31)
MyMembers.returns: A 3D position inside a cubic region originated at 0,0,0
MyMembers.remarks: Uses a double-masking pattern to correctly handle negative coordinates, ensuring the result is always a positive offset within the region.

MyMembers.name: LocalPosByIndexMaskedShifted(int index, int mask, int shift)
MyMembers.summary: Decodes a 1D linear index into a 3D local position inside a cubic region.
MyMembers.param: The 0 based 1D linear index of the cubic region.
The bitwise mask length of the cubic region. (e.g 7, 15, 31)
The number of bits to shift for each dimension (e.g., 4 for a 16-length region, 5 for 32).
MyMembers.returns: A 3D position inside a cubic region originated at 0,0,0
